title: Mind Sap cannot target opponent magic-immune creature after summon window

card.rawText: At any point during the game, play this card from your hand. Negate the equipped creature's effects. While equipped, this card acts as an Infinite equip magic card.

plan.title: Mind Sap cannot target opponent magic-immune creature after summon window
plan.summary: After the summon response window has closed, Mind Sap should not be able to choose an opponent creature that is unaffected by opponent magic cards, though it may still choose a legal non-immune creature.

notes: Do not keep a summon response window open.

steps: Player_1 plays Mind Sap from hand after the summon response window has closed.
Confirm the magic-immune opponent creature is not a legal target.
Choose a legal non-immune creature if one is available.

expectedAssertions.label: Mind Sap target prompt still only includes legal non-immune targets
Mind Sap can still equip to a legal creature
Opponent magic-immune creature was not negated

manualVerification: Confirm the effect dev tool does not offer the opponent magic-immune creature as a Mind Sap target after the summon window closes.
riskNotes: This is the closed-window counterpart to the immediate summon response exception; the card can still target another legal creature.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Mind Sap cannot bypass opponent magic immunity after the summon window closes.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
